input: A stack-based buffer overflow in Fortinet FortiWeb versions 7.2.0 through 7.2.7, and 7.4.0 through 7.4.1 may allow a privileged user to execute arbitrary code via specially crafted CLI commands, provided the user is able to evade FortiWeb stack protections.
output: Affected software versions include Fortinet FortiWeb 7.2.0 through 7.2.7, and 7.4.0 through 7.4.1.
